name: process-safety
description: OSHA PSM (29 CFR 1910.119) and EPA RMP (40 CFR Part 68) compliance toolkit. Screens chemical applicability, generates audit-ready program documentation, and guides implementation for hard tech startups.
author: Colby @ Tobe Energy

commands.name: help
commands.description: Plugin overview, PSM basics, and command reference

commands.name: screen
commands.description: Determine if OSHA PSM and/or EPA RMP apply to your facility

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate a complete, audit-ready PSM program document set

commands.name: test
commands.description: Validate generated PSM program against 12-point audit-ready checklist

commands.name: oca
commands.description: Calculate offsite consequence analysis — distance to endpoint for worst-case and alternative release scenarios

commands.name: rmp
commands.description: Generate RMP data package for EPA submission — all fields required by 40 CFR 68.150-68.185

skills.name: psm-compliance
skills.description: Core PSM/RMP regulatory knowledge — loads automatically when process safety work is detected

hooks.description: Detects existing PSM projects and shows status
